PM: Turn client request into production scope, project structure, milestone and delivery checklist.
UIUX: Create professional responsive layout, design tokens, UI sections and visual hierarchy.
FRONTEND: Generate clean HTML/CSS/JS structure based on approved UIUX plan.
BACKEND: Prepare Firebase/Auth/Firestore/Realtime Database plan and integration checklist.
SEO: Prepare SEO metadata, heading structure, schema, sitemap and optimization checklist.
QA: Review output files, responsive behavior, links, forms, performance and delivery readiness.
